mapper.select:
SELECT M.MATERIAL_ID AS materialId, M.MATERIAL_NAME AS materialName, M.SUPPLY_PRICE AS costPrice,
NVL(I.CURRENT_QUANTITY,0) AS currentQuantity,
(M.SUPPLY_PRICE * NVL(I.CURRENT_QUANTITY,0)) AS buyPrice,
M.STATUS AS status
FROM MATERIALS M
LEFT JOIN STORE_INVENTORIES I ON M.MATERIAL_ID = I.MATERIAL_ID AND I.STORE_ID = #{storeId}
ORDER BY M.MATERIAL_NAME

SELECT PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID AS purchaseOrderId, PO.STORE_ID AS storeId, PO.STATUS AS status, PO.TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount, PO.ORDER_MEMO AS orderMemo, TO_CHAR(PO.CREATED_AT,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS createdAt,
( SELECT MIN(POI.MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT) || ' 외 ' || (COUNT(*) - 1) || '건' FROM PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS POI WHERE POI.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID = PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID ) AS itemSummary
FROM PURCHASE_ORDERS PO
ORDER BY PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_ID DESC
